docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2009 - JUDGMENT. /NO EXHIBITS WERE WITH FILE WHEN JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED/ (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, MONICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GRAYSON, OTIS V. *THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR EQUITABLE RELIEF. PLAINTIFF OR HER DESIGNER MAY ENTER DEFENDANT'S PREMISES AND REMOVE THE 2 TELEVISION SETS AND DVD PLAYER INDENTIFIED IN THE RECEIPT ATTACHED TO MOVING PAPERS. IF TELEVISION SETS AND DVD PLAYER ARE NOT AT THE PREMISES, PLAINTIFF MAY REFILE CLAIM & SEEK DAMAGES. (A COPY OF THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE SENT TO DEFENDANT'S CONSERVATOR: LESTER CLARK, P.O. BOX 505, LANGSTON, OK, 73050) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GRAYSON, OTIS V.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GRAYSON, OTIS V. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LEE, MONICA (DEFENDANT'S CLAIM AGAINST PLAINTIFF WAS SETTLED IN COURT WITH THE HELP OF COURT MEDIATORS. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS STILL OUTSTANDING AND THAT MATTER IS CONTINUED TO APR-13-09, 5:30PM, FOR A PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SEPARATE NOTICE FOR CONTINUANCE.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT RE PLAINTIFF'S OUTSTANDING CLAIM TO APR-13-2009 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT'S DAUGHTER APPEARS ON HIS BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GRAYSON, OTIS V. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LEE, MONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN FILED BY LEE, MONICA GRAYSON, OTIS V.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LEE, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT GRAYSON, OTIS V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
